ddls:
CREATE TABLE "cities" (
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each city */,
  "geographic_area" TEXT /* Geographic area code (e.g., state abbreviation) */,
  "city_name" TEXT /* Name of the city */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Total population of the city */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Geographic latitude */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Geographic longitude */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state to which the city belongs */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("city_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cities_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "demographics" (
  "demo_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each demographic entry */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the city associated with the demographics */,
  "share_white" REAL /* Percentage of the population that is White */,
  "share_black" REAL /* Percentage of the population that is Black */,
  "share_native_american" REAL /* Percentage of the population that is Native American */,
  "share_asian" REAL /* Percentage of the population that is Asian */,
  "share_hispanic" REAL /* Percentage of the population that is Hispanic */,
  "total_population" INTEGER /* Total population of the city */,
  "median_age" REAL /* Median age of the population */,
  "household_size" REAL /* Average household size */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data source */,
  "validation_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the validation entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("demo_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographics_validation_id FOREIGN KEY ("validation_id") REFERENCES data_validations ("validation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographics_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("city_id") REFERENCES cities ("city_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographics_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "states" (
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each state */,
  "state_code" TEXT /* Abbreviation for the state (e.g., AL for Alabama) */,
  "state_name" TEXT /* Full name of the state */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Total population of the state */,
  "capital_city" TEXT /* Capital city of the state */,
  "region" TEXT /* Geographic region (e.g., Northeast, Southeast) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "age_distribution" (
  "age_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for age distribution entry */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the city associated with the age data */,
  "age_group" TEXT /* Age group (e.g., '0-18', '19-35', '36-64', '65+') */,
  "percentage" REAL /* Percentage of the population within the age group */,
  "total_population" INTEGER /* Total population in the age group */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data source */,
  "validation_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the validation entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("age_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_age_distribution_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_age_distribution_validation_id FOREIGN KEY ("validation_id") REFERENCES data_validations ("validation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_age_distribution_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("city_id") REFERENCES cities ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "income_levels" (
  "income_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for income level entry */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the city associated with the income data */,
  "income_bracket" TEXT /* Income bracket (e.g., '< $25,000', '$25,000 - $50,000') */,
  "percentage" REAL /* Percentage of the population within the income bracket */,
  "total_population" INTEGER /* Total population in the income bracket */,
  "median_income" INTEGER /* Median income in the income bracket */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data source */,
  "validation_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the validation entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("income_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_income_levels_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("city_id") REFERENCES cities ("city_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_income_levels_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_income_levels_validation_id FOREIGN KEY ("validation_id") REFERENCES data_validations ("validation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "education_levels" (
  "education_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for education level entry */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the city associated with the education data */,
  "education_level" TEXT /* Education level (e.g., 'High School', 'Bachelor's Degree') */,
  "percentage" REAL /* Percentage of the population with that education level */,
  "total_population" INTEGER /* Total population with the education level */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data source */,
  "validation_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the validation entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("education_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_education_levels_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("city_id") REFERENCES cities ("city_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_education_levels_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_education_levels_validation_id FOREIGN KEY ("validation_id") REFERENCES data_validations ("validation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "historical_demographics" (
  "historical_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for historical demographic entry */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the city associated with the historical data */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the demographic data */,
  "share_white" REAL /* Percentage of the population that is White */,
  "share_black" REAL /* Percentage of the population that is Black */,
  "share_native_american" REAL /* Percentage of the population that is Native American */,
  "share_asian" REAL /* Percentage of the population that is Asian */,
  "share_hispanic" REAL /* Percentage of the population that is Hispanic */,
  "total_population" INTEGER /* Total population of the city for the given year */,
  "median_age" REAL /* Median age of the population for the given year */,
  "household_size" REAL /* Average household size for the given year */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data source */,
  "validation_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the validation entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("historical_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_historical_demographics_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("city_id") REFERENCES cities ("city_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_historical_demographics_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_historical_demographics_validation_id FOREIGN KEY ("validation_id") REFERENCES data_validations ("validation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, analyst, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* ID of the city associated with the accessed data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the browser or device used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the report (e.g., summary, analysis) */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the city associated with the report */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state associated with the report */,
  "summary" TEXT /* Summary of the report content */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* Path to the report file (if stored as a file) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("city_id") REFERENCES cities ("city_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Type of the source (e.g., Census, Survey) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the source */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the data source was last updated */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL to the data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_validations" (
  "validation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each validation entry */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the city associated with the validation */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the source used for validation */,
  "validation_date" TEXT /* Date of validation */,
  "is_valid" INTEGER /* Indicates if the data is valid (true/false) */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments or remarks regarding the validation process */,
  "validated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the validation */,
  "validation_details" TEXT /* Detailed comments or remarks regarding the validation process */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("validation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_validations_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("city_id") REFERENCES cities ("city_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_validations_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_validations_validated_by FOREIGN KEY ("validated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user providing feedback */,
  "feedback_date" TEXT /* Date of the feedback submission */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments or suggestions from the user */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the city associated with the feedback */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state associated with the feedback */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* User rating for the platform (e.g., 1-5 stars) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("city_id") REFERENCES cities ("city_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
